title: 500g Shell Pink Shredded Tissue Paper for Gift Boxes, Pale Pink Shredded Paper for Hampers, Ideal for Gift Packaging & Basket Filling
features: Premium shredded pale pink tissue paper, soft to the touch, biodegradable and 100% eco-friendly, safe for use.
500g pale pink shredded paper is enough to stuffing loads of boxes, hampers, baskets, cost-effective, good for daily use.
Multi-purpose pale pink hamper filling provide protection and amazing decoration for your gifts.
Almost perfect for all occasions, such as Birthday, Wedding, Christening, Valentines' Day, and Christmas etc...
Warms Tips: Please fluff up JeeMooTown shredded tissue paper before use.
